div.p: Simultaneous mutable and immutable storage access via type differentiation
✓ storage_mut::<Position>() → &mut SparseSet<Position> → Mutable borrow of different type

✓ storage::<Velocity>()
→ &SparseSet<Velocity> → Immutable borrow of different type
✓ ALLOWED: Different TypeId keys → No aliasing possible → Safe simultaneous access

g.text: pos.x += vel.dx * dt; // Write to Position
pos.y += vel.dy * dt; // Read from Velocity

ul.li: Cannot have &mut T and &T to the same T simultaneously
HashMap lookups return references to different heap allocations
